message: Node started: Given a list of 49 weights corresponding to 3x3 stamp placements on a 9x9 grid, find a subset of up to 81 placements that maximizes the total sum of the board entries. Note that multiple stamps can overlap, and overlapping cells count their values multiple times (each time they are covered by a stamp). If the problem implies cells can only be counted once, treat this as a Maximum Coverage problem; if cells are counted per stamp, simply pick the top 81 highest-weight stamps. Clarify the overlap rule based on the problem text and solve for the maximum sum.
